title: Dequantization and Classical Limits
description: Understand when quantum linear algebra speedups hold and when classical algorithms can match quantum performance, including Tang's dequantization and sampling-based methods.
learningObjectives: Understand Tang's dequantization of quantum recommendation systems
Analyze when quantum sampling assumptions enable classical speedups
Identify robust quantum advantages in linear algebra
Compare query complexity vs time complexity for quantum algorithms
Recognize the importance of data loading in quantum speedup claims
